name: delivery-team
description: Work-item-driven, sprint-based autonomous software delivery on a pluggable backend (Azure DevOps or GitHub): role-agents + ceremony skills orchestrated by atl work dispatch over claude -p workers.

agents.name: intake
agents.description: The delivery org's conversational front door — runs live in /kickoff, elicits vision and requirements from the human PO, and hands a structured framing to the business-analyst.

agents.name: business-analyst
agents.description: Turns intake discovery into Epics and Features with fixed-heading business analysis, and owns the Domain and business-side Analysis durable-knowledge for the delivery org.

agents.name: technical-analyst
agents.description: Enriches Features/PBIs after the business-analyst with technical analysis — approach, feasibility, NFRs, dependencies, suggested areas — as a sentinel-labeled comment.

agents.name: project-manager
agents.description: Plans sprints for the delivery org: computes capacity from velocity, builds the dependency DAG, admits the right unblocked items, and writes the sprint-review report.

agents.name: tech-lead
agents.description: The delivery-team's highest-context technical role: decomposes Features into keyed work-units, owns the architecture + conventions durable-knowledge, briefs workers, and gates review pre-merge.

agents.name: developer
agents.description: The delivery-team's generic implementer: a fresh isolated claude -p worker per work-unit that loads its tagged area's stack-pack, builds and self-tests in its own worktree, and hands off at PR.

agents.name: tester
agents.description: Independent Level-2 verification — a fresh delivery-team worker per work-unit that probes coverage, edges, and regression, attaches evidence, and gates the loop with a verdict.

skills.name: delivery-init
skills.description: /delivery-init — connect a project to its backend (azure | github): select it, discover coordinates, probe connectivity, then write .delivery/config.json (secret-by-reference) + methodology.json.

skills.name: kickoff
skills.description: /kickoff — greenfield cold-start: live PO intake, then the business-analyst + technical-analyst create the first Epics/Features and seed the Domain/Architecture durable-knowledge. Run once after /delivery-init.

skills.name: refine
skills.description: /refine — recurring backlog refinement: the analysts + tech-lead decompose analyzed Features into keyed, area-tagged, dependency-linked work-units, each with a canonical developer brief.

skills.name: sprint-plan
skills.description: /sprint-plan — velocity-driven sprint selection: capacity from the last N=3 closed sprints, then the project-manager admits backlog units by priority at one granularity and assigns each the sprint's iteration.

skills.name: sprint-start
skills.description: /sprint-start — build the sprint's dependency DAG, fail-fast on a cycle or a missing mobile emulator, materialize .delivery/plan.json, and hand off to the atl work dispatch engine.

skills.name: sprint-review
skills.description: /sprint-review — sprint-end: compile the Sprint Review Report (completed, PRs, evidence, dev preview, velocity, findings) and run the PO Approve/Reject gate that alone triggers dev→release.

areas.name: web
areas.description: React + TypeScript + Vite frontend — the web surface (preview / chrome-devtools MCP + code CI).

areas.name: mobile
areas.description: Flutter + Dart mobile app — the emulator surface (booted simulator/emulator + code CI).

areas.name: api
areas.description: Node.js + Express + TypeScript backend API — the code surface (unit + integration CI).
